## Validation

- [ ] Typecheck, lint, tests, formatting, and build pass as applicable.
- [ ] Regression coverage was added or an omission is explained.
- [ ] A Changeset was added when published behavior changes.
- [ ] Documentation was updated when public behavior changes.
- [ ] If an issue reporter opted in and materially contributed, the implementation or squash commit contains the correct `Co-authored-by` trailer.
